calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Amended

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricai Abalos.
Danielle T. Zaragoza, Esq. for Petitioners: Roger L. Barnett and Solan Lindemann Barnett, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Rex Percy Lyle Lindermann Barnett, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Harry Lyle Lindemann Barnett.
Decree signed in open court.
